description_long: This is a rectangular wooden cabinet or shelf with a rich brown finish and metallic gold trim accentuating its edges and front panel. The front face features a large, recessed rectangular panel bordered by gold, giving it a classic, slightly ornate appearance. The back side reveals two open shelves, providing ample storage or display space, while the sides are plain and unadorned, showing the wood grain texture. The top surface is flat and sturdy, suitable for placing additional items. The construction appears solid, with the wood grain and minor scuffs suggesting it is designed for practical use in urban environments such as lobbies, garages, or public waiting areas. The overall design is both functional and decorative, blending traditional and modern elements.
description: A rectangular wooden cabinet or shelf with gold trim, featuring a decorative front panel and open shelving at the back. The piece combines classic wood grain with metallic accents for a functional yet stylish urban furnishing.
description_view_0: Front view shows a decorative recessed panel bordered by gold trim, with no visible openings or shelves.
description_view_1: Side view reveals a plain wooden surface with visible grain and no additional features.
description_view_2: Back view exposes two open shelves, indicating storage or display functionality.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing a plain wooden surface.
